items.name_en: Premium Original Leather M25087 White mini Capucines Series. The Capucines mini handbag was born in 2013, named after the Paris street where Louis Vuitton opened its first store in 1854. This Capucines mini handbag features full-grain Taurillon leather, blending multiple brand elements: leather-wrapped LV letters, a handle inspired by classic trunks, and a distinctive flap featuring Monogram flowers. With the shoulder strap, you can switch between hand and shoulder carry. Dimensions: 21 × 13.6 × 8 cm

items.name_en: Premium Original Leather M24729 Black mini. This Capucines mini handbag is crafted from fine Taurillon leather, brightened by a lustrous handle ring and the iconic LV letters. The detachable shoulder strap allows for easy conversion between shoulder and crossbody wear. Dimensions: 21 × 13.6 × 8 cm

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo M48865 White & Pink Enamel Chain Mini】This Capucines Mini bag features soft, muted tones that make the classic silhouette stand out. Exquisite chains link metal Monogram flowers, each cast, enameled, and hand-polished to shine with brilliant luster. The flap can be worn on the outside or tucked inside to reveal the LV logo. size:21x14x8cm

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Photo M48865 Cream White Octagonal Chain/Mini】M25232 This Capucines Mini handbag is crafted from bright Taurillon cowhide, with colorful enamel set into the delicate octagonal chain links, embodying the Art Deco design philosophy. 3D LV letters add a fresh touch. 21 x 14 x 8 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: Premium top-grain leather M23951 Light green with white mini. This Capucines mini handbag features a beautiful Lovelock braided chain. It connects hand-painted Monogram elements and the LV monogram lock with chain links. Contrasting leather forms the iconic LV logo, exuding an elegant air. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 8 cm
